condition: commodity price increase, export-control headline, safe-haven demand, China stimulus, supply shortage headline, or science theme only
example: Rare-earth export-control news, copper record high, or graphene/MXene/superconductor social-media theme.

condition: price floor, offtake, government investment, customer contract, M&A, production plan, buyback, realized price, or AISC confirmed
example: MP Materials DoD/Apple contracts, Barrick realized price plus AISC plus buyback, or Equinox-Orla jurisdiction M&A.

condition: OP/EPS/FCF revision, cost control, stable production, capital return, price-path alignment, and no hard 4C flag
example: Gold miner Stage 3 needs realized price, AISC, production delivery, FCF, and capital return, not just gold price.

condition: scarcity or strategic-material narrative is widely accepted and valuation moves ahead of production/FCF
example: MP Materials YTD +275% before dilution risk is resolved.

condition: price collapse, supply restart, oversupply, dilution, governance shock, event premium unwind, input-cost spike, or replication failure
example: Korea Zinc share issuance/probe, LG/Lotte petrochemical oversupply, lithium -86%, HPAL sulfur squeeze, or speculative science failure.
